channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Delta Sports Commission Chairman denies assault allegation, alleges blackmail plot
item.description: Chairman of Delta State Sports Commission, Onoriode Oborevwori, don come out strongly to deny allegation say him beat one kickboxing coach, Steve Momah, for him office. He talk say the story na pure b...

item.title: Evanston Mayor Daniel Biss Secures Illinois 9th District Democratic Nomination
item.description: Evanston Mayor Daniel Biss has won the Democratic primary for Illinois' 9th congressional district, succeeding longtime Rep. Jan Schakowsky after her retirement announcement. The Chicago-area seat, he...

item.title: PCSO Adopts 4-Day Workweek to Support Energy-Saving Efforts
item.description: The Philippine Charity Sweepstakes Office (PCSO) has announced the implementation of a four-day workweek as part of national efforts to conserve energy. According to PCSO general manager Melquiades Ro...

item.title: Richard Gutierrez, Bela Padilla, and Gerald Anderson share insights on their roles in 'Blood vs Duty'
item.description: ABS-CBN Studios recently offered a preview of its upcoming television drama 'Blood vs Duty,' featuring an all-star cast led by Richard Gutierrez, Bela Padilla, and Gerald Anderson. The series promises...

item.title: Typical Lifespan of Rental Property Carpets and Responsibility for Replacement
item.description: This article explains how long carpets typically last in rental properties and clarifies when landlords or tenants are responsible for replacement. In general, carpets in rentals last between 5 and 7 ...

item.title: US Defence Official Elbridge Colby Scheduled to Visit India for Strategic Talks
item.description: The top US defence official, Elbridge Colby, is set to visit India in the near future to discuss matters related to defence and regional security. While official details about his itinerary and specif...

item.title: Self Esteem and David Hare discuss the revival of 1975 play Teeth ’n’ Smiles and its relevance to today’s music industry
item.description: In this interview, musician Rebecca Lucy Taylor, known as Self Esteem, and playwright David Hare discuss the West End revival of Hare’s 1975 play Teeth ’n’ Smiles. The play depicts a rock band’s chaot...

item.title: Sibisi prepares for SA flyweight title defence against Samkelo 'The Tank' Sotomela
item.description: KwaZulu-Natal promoters are ensuring that local boxing champions remain active to prevent losing their belts due to inactivity. Champions are required to defend their titles within 90 days in a volunt...

item.title: NDA and INDIA fronts to decide seat‑sharing and alliance strategy in Puducherry by Wednesday night
item.description: Political parties in Puducherry are in a tense phase as the ruling National Democratic Alliance (NDA) and the opposition Indian National Developmental Inclusive Alliance (INDIA) bloc prepare to take a...

item.title: Call for leaders to uphold dignity and issue-based politics ahead of 2027 elections
item.description: This opinion piece by Macharia Gaitho raises serious concern about the rising toxic political environment in Kenya as the country heads towards the 2027 elections. The writer reflects on the public ex...

item.title: Air Street Capital Raises $232 Million Fund to Back Early-Stage AI Startups
item.description: London-based Air Street Capital has announced the launch of its third fund, raising $232 million to invest in early-stage artificial intelligence startups across Europe and North America. The firm, le...

item.title: Doris Mollel Foundation awarded by WHO for advancing maternal and newborn health in Tanzania
item.description: The World Health Organization (WHO) has awarded the Doris Mollel Foundation for its outstanding work in improving maternal and newborn health in Tanzania. The award, presented by WHO Director-General ...

item.title: Child labor cases fall by 38.5 percent amid government and society efforts – DOLE
item.description: Ayon sa Department of Labor and Employment (DOLE), ang mga kaso ng child labor sa bansa ay bumaba ng 38.5 porsiyento, mula sa 828,000 noong 2022 patungong 509,000 noong 2024. Ito ang pinakabagong esta...

item.title: Kenyans Urged to Ignore Absentee Politicians During Elections
item.description: There is a pattern Kenyans keep tolerating that makes no sense. Politicians rejected in the 2022 elections vanished after polls, only to resurface as 2027 elections approach. These leaders, once out o...

item.title: Ukraine explores LNG imports from Mozambique amid energy shortage
item.description: Ukraine, weh imekumbwa na kupungua kwa uzalishaji wa gesi kutokana na mashambulizi ya Russia, inatafuta njia mpya za kupata nishati. Rais Volodymyr Zelenskiy alisema kuwa nchi yake ina interest ya kua...

item.title: Ruto warns opposition that elections are serious contests, not pageants
item.description: President William Ruto has told the opposition that the upcoming general election is not a beauty contest, emphasising that Kenyans care more about tangible development and leadership performance than...

item.title: A Cold War‑Style Numbers Station Resurfaces Over Iran During US–Israel Strikes
item.description: At the start of the US–Israel military campaign against Iran on February 28, 2026, a shortwave radio transmission began airing twice daily on the 7910 kHz frequency, later switching to 7842 kHz after ...

item.title: Gauteng Cop Explains Harley-Davidson Gear at Madlanga Commission, Denies Bribery
item.description: Sergeant Fannie Nkosi, an officer with the Gauteng Organised Crime Unit, appeared before the Madlanga Commission to respond to allegations of bribery linked to controversial businessman Katiso 'KT' Mo...

item.title: McDonald's Tests Humanoid Robots in Shanghai Restaurant
item.description: A McDonald’s restaurant in Shanghai is currently trialling humanoid robots to take orders from diners, marking a significant step in the integration of advanced robotics within the food service indust...

item.title: Challenges facing Kenya's Constitution and societal issues
item.description: The article highlights growing concerns about the state of Kenya's political and social landscape. Taabu Tele warns that the 2010 Constitution has been undermined, pushing the country towards a more c...
